creator: knezour@weboutsourcing.cz
text:
There is typo in the part 29.12.2.1. Connecting to a Target Without a Configuration File, where example in text

This message means that the specified target name is wrong:
Target name                                     Target portal   State
iqn.2012-06.com.example:atrget0                 10.10.10.10     Not found

should read :target0, not ATrget0
